name: Treant

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.text: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

text:
# Treant

*Huge Plant, Chaotic Good*

An ancient awakened tree, shepherd of forests and slow to anger — but terrible once roused.

### Actions

**Slam.** Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. Hit: 16 (3d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

**Hail of Bark.** Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 180 ft. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) Piercing damage.
